layout.main_container: h-screen w-full flex flex-col md:flex-row overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white
layout.sidebar: w-full md:w-80 lg:w-96 h-full border-r border-white/10 bg-[#0A0A0A] flex flex-col z-10 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar
layout.card: p-6 border-b border-white/10 flex flex-col gap-5

components.AircraftProfile: Image of P51D at top (max-h-48 object-cover). Large registration N51ZW heading. Status badge next to it.
components.FlightDataCard: Grid of telemetry data. Monospace fonts for numbers (JetBrains Mono). Include Altitude, Speed, Heading, Vertical Rate, Squawk.
components.AlertSettings: Toggles using Shadcn Switch style. Blue accent (#007AFF). Includes Polling Interval select (10s to 5min).
components.EventLog: Scrollable area at the bottom. Small text, monospace timestamps. Border-l-2 with status colors.
components.Map: Leaflet map taking remaining space. Custom marker for plane (rotating based on heading).
components.StatusBadge: Pill shape, text-xs uppercase bold, varying color based on status (Green=In Flight, Yellow=Signal Lost, Gray=On Ground).
components.ToggleSwitch: A custom or Shadcn toggle. Active state bg-[#007AFF].

interactions.hover: Subtle background lightening on interactive list items.
interactions.toggles: Smooth color transition to primary blue.
interactions.map_marker: Smooth CSS transition for position and rotation to animate between polling updates. E.g., `transition: transform 1s linear`.

p51d_mustang.description: WWII P-51D Mustang fighter plane in flight
p51d_mustang.usage: Aircraft Profile section in the sidebar hero image

instructions_to_main_agent: Use react-leaflet and leaflet for the map. Apply standard OSM tiles but add a CSS class to the TileLayer or map container with the CSS filter provided in layout.map_dark_mode_filter to make it dark mode.
For the plane icon, use a custom divIcon in Leaflet with an inline SVG of a plane, and apply `transform: rotate(${heading}deg)` to it.

The data fetching from OpenSky Network should poll according to the selected interval. OpenSky free tier does not require auth but is rate-limited. N51ZW ICAO hex is a6616a. Endpoint: https://opensky-network.org/api/states/all?icao24=a6616a

The data format from OpenSky: state vector is an array. Index 1 is callsign, 2 is origin country, 5 is longitude, 6 is latitude, 7 is baro_altitude, 8 is on_ground, 9 is velocity, 10 is true_track (heading), 11 is vertical_rate, 14 is squawk.
Use standard JS/JSX files, NO TypeScript.
Install lucide-react if not present, for icons.
Implement Web Notifications API for browser push alerts (request permission on load or setting toggle).
For audio alarm, use an HTMLAudioElement with a standard alert beep sound (can use a simple data URI for a beep).
Follow the sidebar layout strictly. Use JetBrains Mono for data numbers.
Include data-testid on toggles, buttons, and data elements.
